hallucinations.description: The paper reports fabricated experimental metrics and outcomes (e.g., rho_r values of 0.412-0.618 for IF/FastIF, 5 metric crossings, top-50 Jaccard of 0.0024) that directly contradict the actual code execution results in experiment_summary.json and gate evaluations (near-zero correlations ~0.01, n_crossings=0, no CI-separated crossings).
hallucinations.evidence: Paper Section 5.1 table shows IF rho_r=0.412 at budget 10 and 5 crossings; code results/experiment_summary.json shows all rho_r/rho_m <0.02 with n_crossings=0 and gate FAIL for H-E1.

hallucinations.description: References to future/nonexistent papers such as Li et al. (2026) LoRIF and Ilyas & Engstrom (2025) MAGIC.
hallucinations.evidence: References section lists 'Li, S., ... (2026). LoRIF...' and 'Ilyas, A. and Engstrom, L. (2025). MAGIC...'.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: primarily faked experimental results with severe mismatch between paper claims and actual code outputs; also nonexistent future citations. Severity is high as core claims are fabricated.
